changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 24): ZERO ceasefire signals in active war theaters. Israel escalates with judiciary site strikes in Fars. Iran retaliates with cluster warheads. Pakistan kills 400+ in Kabul hospital. Putin-Trump call TODAY is Ukraine-focused, not ME. Hormuz remains effectively closed (21 tankers in 18 days). Oil crisis deepens. All alliances fracturing — NATO rejects Hormuz coalition. Only de-escalatory signal: Iraq resumes Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline, bypassing Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: IDF to strike Litani River bridges — cuts evacuation routes for 900K+ displaced
latest_news.text: Israel announces plan to strike all crossings on Litani River. Orders civilians south of Litani to evacuate north — then destroys the bridges they'd use. IDF says Hezbollah operates 'under civilian cover.' 900K+ displaced in Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: 6 killed in Israeli airstrike on Beirut — building levelled in Bashoura
latest_news.text: Two strikes on Beirut this morning. Residential building levelled in Bashoura. 6 killed, 24 wounded. Israel targets Hezbollah finance network (Al-Qard Al-Hassan) and Hamasin Division HQ.

latest_news.headline: Iran targets Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, UAE overnight — sustained Gulf bombardment
latest_news.text: All four Gulf states report Iranian drone/missile intercepts overnight. Well over half targeted UAE. Kuwait air defense engaged. Iran continues wave attacks on US bases in Gulf. HRW condemns 'unlawful strikes endangering civilians.'

latest_news.headline: Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine — no breakthrough reported yet
latest_news.text: Putin-Trump phone call March 18 to discuss ending Ukraine war. Lavrov pre-rejects any settlement without all territorial demands. Iran war dominates Trump's agenda. Oil revenue boost reducing Russia's incentive to negotiate.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 12:04 UTC) — War Day 24. ESCALATION CONTINUES: (1) Israel kills 4th senior Iranian official (Intelligence Minister Khatib); (2) Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (3) 4 blasts in Erbil near US assets — Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal; (4) Hormuz 'gravest oil supply disruption in history' per CNBC — only 21 tankers in 18 days, China gets selective passage; (5) US bombed Kharg Island military sites; (6) Pakistan Kabul airstrike kills dozens — NYT/Bloomberg confirm, global ceasefire calls but no diplomatic track; (7) Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine; (8) Lavrov rejects settlement; (9) Mojtaba Khamenei rejects all ceasefire proposals. ZERO ceasefire signals in active war theaters.
